name: Cheerful Sunflower
subject: nature/flower
prompt: a tall cheerful sunflower in full bloom, a large round center packed with seeds, a wide ring of long pointed petals around it, a sturdy stem with two broad leaves, standing proud against a few small clouds

name: Blooming Rose
subject: nature/flower
prompt: a single open rose seen from the front, many layered curling petals spiraling out from a tight bud center, a curved stem with a couple of thorns and two serrated leaves, elegant and full

name: Three Garden Tulips
subject: nature/flower
prompt: three tulips of slightly different heights growing side by side, each with a smooth cup-shaped blossom of six rounded petals on a straight stem, long slender leaves at the base, a little grass beneath them

name: Cute Smiling Flower
subject: nature/flower
prompt: a cute cartoon flower with a happy smiling face in its round center, five big simple rounded petals, two little leaf arms, and a short stem, very chunky and easy with thick simple shapes

name: Easy Daisy
subject: nature/flower
prompt: one simple daisy with a round center button and a single ring of evenly spaced oval petals, a straight stem and two small leaves, clean and uncluttered with bold simple lines for young children

name: Round Flower Wreath
subject: nature/flower
prompt: a symmetrical circular flower mandala built from repeating rings of petals radiating from a central blossom, layered floral patterns, dots and small leaves filling the rings, intricate and detailed for relaxing coloring

name: Flower Bouquet in a Vase
subject: nature/flower
prompt: a full bouquet of mixed flowers arranged in a round vase, a rose, a daisy, a tulip and a couple of small buds with leaves and stems, the vase sitting on a flat surface, balanced and cheerful

name: Cherry Blossom Branch
subject: nature/flower
prompt: a curving cherry blossom branch with clusters of five-petaled blossoms and small round buds along it, a few petals drifting in the air, slim twigs branching off, light and airy springtime feel

name: Lotus Flower on Water
subject: nature/flower
prompt: a serene lotus flower floating open on calm water, many pointed petals layered around a rounded seed pod center, a large flat lily pad beside it, gentle ripples around the base

name: Bee on a Daisy
subject: nature/flower
prompt: a friendly round bumblebee with striped body and little wings landing on the center of a large daisy, the daisy's petals spread wide, a stem with leaves below, a few dotted flight lines around the bee

name: Flower Garden Scene
subject: nature/flower
prompt: a cheerful garden row of several different flowers growing together, tall sunflowers, short tulips and daisies of varying heights, a little picket fence behind them, a sun and a butterfly above

name: Rose Close-Up
subject: nature/flower
prompt: an extreme close-up of a single rose blossom that fills the whole frame, many overlapping curved petals with detailed inner folds spiraling toward the center, fine veins on the petals, intricate for detailed coloring
